title: Green Herbal Dutch Lamb Tagine
description: A low-calorie and energizing Dutch dish featuring dried oregano and lamb, cooked in a traditional clay tagine vessel, with a creamy and herbal flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry and cut it into a circle to fit the clay tagine vessel.
In a large bowl, mix together the lamb, dried oregano, green onions, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the clay tagine vessel over medium heat and brown the lamb mixture on all sides.
Add the chicken broth and yogurt to the tagine vessel and stir to combine.
Cover the vessel with the puff pastry circle and press the edges to seal.
Place the tagine vessel in the preheated oven and bake for 2 hours.
Remove the vessel from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb and sauce hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
